question: Which of the following is apt definition for DevOps?

options.label: D
options.text: A movement to improve communication and colaboration

answer: A movement to improve communication and colaboration

question: Which of the following activity is involved in Sprint Review?

options.label: A
options.text: Inspect and seek feedback from the stakeholders.

options.label: B
options.text: seek approval for the work done

answer: Inspect and seek feedback from the stakeholders.

question: Which of the following statements are INCORRECT about scrum master? 1. Scrum master facilitates the scrum team and the product owner to perform day to day activities 2. Scrum master Leads the discussion in Scrum Events or Meetings 3. Scrum master is Customer who has given the requirements

What will be the output of the code given below?
public class Test {
public static void main(String[] args) {
int accounts[] = {101, 1012, 103};
try {
System.out.print("A");
int accId = accounts[2];
System.out.print("B");
} catch(ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException exception) {
System.out.print("E1");
} finally {
System.out.print("F1");
}
}
}

What would be the output of the code given below?
public class Demo {
public static void main(String[] args) {
try {
test();
} catch(Exception exception) {
System.out.println("Main Catch");
}
}
public static void test() { // Line-X
try {
throw new RuntimeException(); // Line-Y
} finally {
System.out.println("Test Finally");
}
}
}

options.label: C
options.text: Compilation Error at Line-Y Unhandled exception type ArithmeticException

options.label: D
options.text: Compilation Error at Line-X missing exception propagation type ArithmeticException

question: Identify the CORRECT statement with respect to Map. (I) LinkedHashMap stores data in the insertion order (II) TreeMap stores data in the ascending order of "Value"

What will be the output of the code given below? Assume that all required classes and interfaces are imported.
public class Test {
public static void main(String[] args) {
Map myMap = new TreeMap();
myMap.put(18, 150);
myMap.put(30, 25);
myMap.put(20, 50);
Set keySet = myMap.keySet();
for(Integer key: keySet) {
System.out.print(myMap.get(key) + " ");
}
}
}

Assume that table Employee(employeeId int(5)) is already created and it has 2 records. The code given below is to print all employee ids from Employee table. Identify the correct code to be placed at Line-X so that all employee ids will be printed.
PreparedStatement pstat = conn.prepareStatement("SELECT employeeId FROM Employee ORDER By employeeId");
ResultSet rs = pstat.executeQuery();
while(rs.next()){
System.out.println(// Line-X
}

Assume that class CustomerEntity is mapped to table Customer and it has a record. CustomerId is the primary key. What will happen in the customer table, if the below JPA code executes successfully?
CustomerEntity entity = new CustomerEntity();
entity.setCustomerId(1002);
entity.setCustomerName("Justin");
entityManager.getTransaction().begin();
entityManager.merge(entity); // Line X
entityManager.getTransaction().commit();

options.label: A
options.text: No Record will be inserted to Customer table

options.label: B
options.text: Inserts a new record with customerId "1002" and customerName "Justin"

options.label: C
options.text: Runtime Error at Line X: No Record found with id 1002

options.label: D
options.text: No record will be updated in Customer table

answer: Inserts a new record with customerId "1002" and customerName "Justin"

list.add(1);
list.add(3);
list.add(4);
